title: component_summary.py output
description: component_summary.py requires --component. component_breakdown is always a single-element array (there's only one component in scope, since --component is a required filter — kept as an array rather than a bare object for shape consistency with every other operation's breakdown pair). criticality_breakdown is the same summary computed per component_criticality tier within that component.

total_spend.description: Sum of line_spend_usd over the row's scope.

po_count.description: Row count of the row's scope.

component_breakdown.description: Single-element array: the whole filtered scope's summary (unchanged from this operation's previous flat top-level shape).

criticality_breakdown.description: One row per component_criticality tier present in scope.
